profile_summary: Highly motivated Third-Year Software Engineering student (GPA 9.2/10.0) at the School of Electrical Engineering (ETF), University of Belgrade, specializing in Data Structures and Algorithms (DSA) and System Programming (C/C++, Java, Python). Seeking to leverage advanced technical skills and a robust background in low-level systems and application development to contribute high-impact solutions to a challenging and innovative engineering environment. Strong communication and teamwork skills developed through university projects.

education.institution: University of Belgrade - School of Electrical Engineering (ETF)

projects.project_name: Multithreaded Preemptive Kernel for RISC-V Architecture
projects.description: Developed a foundational kernel model to demonstrate core OS concepts, focusing heavily on memory management, threads, and low-level hardware interaction.
Developed a functional command-line interpreter applying advanced OOP principles in C++, focusing on clean architecture and modular design for command execution and parsing.
Developed a visual flight simulator using Java AWT for the GUI, strictly adhering to Object-Oriented Programming principles for clean, scalable design and management of flight data.
Developed interactive, fully functional game applications in Python, demonstrating strong capabilities in algorithmic logic design and efficient problem-solving for complex game rules.

projects.project_name: Binary Tree, Fibonacci heap, B* Tree and Graph Algorithms
projects.description: Implemented performance-critical algorithms for B* Tree indexing, Binary Search Trees, and Graph theory, utilizing C/C++ to achieve high computational efficiency and optimal algorithmic complexity.

metadata.notes: Only information visible in the CV text should be included.
